title: Optimized ERC1155 setApprovalForAll with 0/1 boolean enforcement
yul_optimized:
assembly {
    isApproved := iszero(iszero(isApproved))
    mstore(0x20, _ERC1155_MASTER_SLOT_SEED)
    mstore(0x14, caller())
    mstore(0x00, operator)
    sstore(keccak256(0x0c, 0x34), isApproved)
    mstore(0x00, isApproved)
    log3(0x00, 0x20, _APPROVAL_FOR_ALL_EVENT_SIGNATURE, caller(), shr(96, shl(96, operator)))
}
explanation: Guarantees boolean storage is strictly 0 or 1 using `iszero(iszero())` to clean dirty bits. Directly computes the double mapping slot via memory concatenation and emits the `log3` event using the same scratch space.
when_to_apply: Any mapping(address => mapping(address => bool)) approval update
